headline: Chubb Expands Cancer Cover And Hong Kong Funding As Growth Story Evolves
summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) has launched a new cancer care insurance product in Canada, expanding its presence in the supplemental health insurance market. The company has also received strong credit ratings from AM Best on new senior unsecured bonds issued in Hong Kong. These moves highlight Chubb's activity in both product expansion and global capital markets, with potential implications for its international footprint. Chubb enters this news cycle with its stock at $320.09 and a return of 66.3% over...
